mobileGate.description: The mobile experience is only available through the YoutubeVault Android app. Tap above to download it, or continue in your browser.

auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.checkYourEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to finish creating your account.
auth.resendEmailSent: If that email needs verification, a new link has been sent.
auth.verifyEmailFailed: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

playlists.title: Your Playlists
playlists.offlineBanner: This service can't reach the internet right now, so syncing is unavailable. Playback of already-downloaded songs still works fine.
playlists.emptyState: No playlists yet. Click "Add Playlist" and paste a YouTube playlist URL.
playlists.pausingTooltip: Waiting for the current song to finish before pausing
playlists.pausingMessage: Pausing… waiting for "{{title}}" to finish syncing
playlists.pausingMessageGeneric: Pausing… waiting for the current song to finish syncing

addDialog.title: Add Playlist
addDialog.namePlaceholder: Leave blank to use YouTube title
addDialog.fetching: Fetching playlist… large playlists may take a moment.
addDialog.genericError: Failed to add playlist. Check the URL and try again.

renameDialog.title: Rename Playlist
renameDialog.helperText: Leave blank to use the YouTube title

videoList.mbError: MusicBrainz lookup failed — will retry automatically

deleteConfirm.title: Remove playlist?
deleteConfirm.message: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all its downloaded files. This can't be undone.

detail.noTracks: No tracks match the selected genres.

trackDetail.recommendedEmpty: No recommendations yet — this track hasn't been analyzed, or nothing similar has been found in your library.

profile.title: Profile
profile.pendingEmailNotice: A confirmation link was sent to {{email}}. Click it to finish changing your email — submit this form again to resend.
profile.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.description: Get the YoutubeVault Android app to browse your playlists and listen offline on your phone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

smtp.title: Email (SMTP)
smtp.description: Used to send signup verification emails. Leave the host blank to turn email verification off entirely — new accounts are then verified and signed in immediately.

postgres.title: Database (PostgreSQL)
postgres.description: The connection is tested before it's applied — invalid values are rejected so the app keeps running on the current database.
postgres.required: Database, username, and password are all required.

banConfirm.title: Ban this user?
banConfirm.message: "{{name}}" will immediately lose access to their account. You can unban them at any time.
